mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_MATERIAL_WARNING_RECORD ( ID, MATERIAL_ID, MATERIAL_NAME, CURRENT_STOCK, WARNING_THRESHOLD, RECEIVERS, CREATE_TIME, HANDLE_STATUS ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{materialId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currentStock,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{warningThreshold,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{receivers,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{handleStatus,jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM E_MATERIAL_WARNING_RECORD WHERE MATERIAL_ID = #{materialId} AND HANDLE_STATUS = 0

SELECT T1.ID, T1.MATERIAL_ID, T1.MATERIAL_NAME, T1.CURRENT_STOCK, T1.WARNING_THRESHOLD, T1.RECEIVERS, T1.CREATE_TIME, T1.HANDLE_STATUS, T1.HANDLE_TIME, T1.HANDLE_USER_ID, DECODE(T1.HANDLE_STATUS, 0, '未处理', 1, '已处理', '') AS HANDLE_STATUS_LABEL, S1.USER_NAME AS HANDLE_USER_NAME FROM E_MATERIAL_WARNING_RECORD T1 LEFT JOIN SYS_USER S1 ON T1.HANDLE_USER_ID = S1.ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND T1.MATERIAL_NAME LIKE '%' || #{materialName} || '%'
AND TO_CHAR(T1.HANDLE_STATUS) = #{handleStatus}
ORDER BY T1.HANDLE_STATUS ASC, T1.CREATE_TIME DESC

SELECT T1.ID, T1.MATERIAL_ID, T1.MATERIAL_NAME, T1.CURRENT_STOCK, T1.WARNING_THRESHOLD, T1.RECEIVERS, T1.CREATE_TIME, T1.HANDLE_STATUS, T1.HANDLE_TIME, T1.HANDLE_USER_ID, DECODE(T1.HANDLE_STATUS, 0, '未处理', 1, '已处理', '') AS HANDLE_STATUS_LABEL, S1.USER_NAME AS HANDLE_USER_NAME FROM E_MATERIAL_WARNING_RECORD T1 LEFT JOIN SYS_USER S1 ON T1.HANDLE_USER_ID = S1.ID WHERE T1.ID = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_MATERIAL_WARNING_RECORD SET HANDLE_STATUS = 1, HANDLE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, HANDLE_USER_ID = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} WHERE HANDLE_STATUS = 0 AND ID IN
#{id}
